changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between rule_expression and module_rule_expression
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_rule_expression_to_module ON rule_expression; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_rule_expression_to_module_rule_expression();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between rule and module_rule
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_rule_to_module ON rule; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_rule_to_module_rule();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between rule_set and module_rule_set
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_rule_set_to_module ON rule_set; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_rule_set_to_module_rule_set();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between rule_set_rule and module_rule_set_rule
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_rule_set_rule_to_module ON rule_set_rule; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_rule_set_rule_to_module_rule_set_rule();
